content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — demo credentials present (reviewer@focusshield.example / Gv7kQz2mNp) but notes.txt just says "n/a" with no instructions on reaching the subscription paywall/App blocking features (`fastlane/metadata/review_information/notes.txt:1`).
Pierre: Apple's reviewer needs explicit steps to reach gated functionality, especially since this app has both a login wall (`App/LoginView.swift`) and a paywall (`App/PaywallView.swift:8`) — without guidance, reviewers may not know whether subscription features can be tested via sandbox or require a bypass. Please replace "n/a" with concrete steps: how to log in, whether the subscription is pre-unlocked for review, and how to reach blocking/schedules/reports screens.
